blended.narrative: Saddleback Maine is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 224 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
